description: Optimised for deep research, literature synthesis, and evidence-based reporting.

thinking.rationale: Research synthesis requires cross-source comparison and contradiction resolution. 12K budget handles multi-source integration without hitting Free Tier timeout risk.

knowledge_strategy.rationale: Research profiles must prioritise loaded knowledge collections before web search.

tool_strategy.rationale: Research requires both loaded collections and live web search for current information.

rpm_optimization.rationale: Research requests are expensive. Hard cap at 3 to avoid quota exhaustion.
